[PUBLISHED DATE]: 2022-02-27
[TITLE]: Fact Check: Old image circulated as Ukrainian children sending-off army for war with Russia - India Today
[METADATA/INTRO]: Fact Check: Old image circulated as Ukrainian children sending-off army for war with Russia India Today's Anti Fake News War Room found that the image has been on the internet at least since 2016 and the claim posted with the...
[BEST EVIDENCE CHUNK]: Fact Check: Old image circulated as Ukrainian children sending-off army for war with Russia 
 India Today's Anti Fake News War Room found that the image has been on the internet at least since 2016 and the claim posted with the image was misleading. 
 Thousands of Ukrainian men have joined the country's defense force to fight Russia as the invasion rages on. Now, an image of two children saluting the Ukrainian army moving in tankers is viral on social media. It is claimed to be a recent image of children in Ukraine sending off the country’s army for war with Russia. The personnel can be seen waving hands at the children.

[PUBLISHED DATE]: Unknown Date
[TITLE]: Fundraiser by Yulia Khouri : Help Refugee Children of War in Ukraine
[METADATA/INTRO]: - S - C...
[BEST EVIDENCE CHUNK]: This page is dedicated to raise urgent funds to support the most vulnerable Ukrainian civilians in Ukraine & the Ukrainian refugees of war, especially women and children currently flooding towards Lviv, Western Ukraine and into Poland. 
 People leaving their homes taking the absolute necessities and whatever they can carry with them. With their young children, elderly and pets they cross the country to get to relative safety in the Western Region. 
 While the entire country is under severe military attacks, mass arrivals to Lviv does not guarantee security or safety (just "safer for now"). However humanitarian agencies there work with the local municipalities and run the refugees reception. Centers where the registration of incoming refugees is done. From their the newcomers are directed to the available homes of local citizens that welcome refugees in their own homes, and to the make shift refugees centers too. In addition, people are given food and daily alliances of formula, diapers, sleeping bags, clothes etc. No one is left behind.

[PUBLISHED DATE]: 2022-03-21
[TITLE]: The Russian—Ukrainian War 2022: Initial Observations and Lessons – The Jerusalem Strategic Tribune
[METADATA/INTRO]: On February 24, 2022, after a few months of preparations, the Russian army invaded Ukraine and at the time of this writing, in mid-March, the fighting is ongoing. This essay is an attempt to offer initial observations and lessons from...
[BEST EVIDENCE CHUNK]: One difficult chore is discerning photos and videos taken from other wars or events and given a Ukrainian title. One example is the clip purporting to show a Ukrainian woman taking control of an abandoned Russian armored car as an example of the Russian losses. In fact, the woman is a Russian civilian mechanic who makes videos on vehicle maintenance and made this particular clip more than a year ago in tribute to the Russian army on the annual “Defenders of the Motherland” day. 
 What We Do Not Know 
 It is important to make clear what we do not know before attempting to assess the situation:
